Get 50% Off My First Treatment

How It Works

Three easy steps to a pest-free home

1

Text to Claim Your Discount

Text SAVE50 to (818) 353-4800 and lock in 50% off your first service. Takes 30 seconds and there's no commitment.

2

We Book Your Visit

We'll confirm a convenient appointment time that fits your schedule. Our technicians arrive on time — we respect your day.

3

We Treat, You Relax

Our licensed technician treats your home using proven, family-safe methods. You sit back and enjoy a pest-free environment.

Text SAVE50 — Get 50% Off

Family Owned · Licensed & Insured in California

🛡️

100% Satisfaction Guarantee

If you see any pests between treatments, we'll come back absolutely free!

We stand behind every treatment we perform. If pests return before your next scheduled visit, just give us a call and we'll return at no additional charge. No questions asked.

Our Promise

Safe For Your Family & Pets

Your family's safety is our top priority. We use only EPA-registered products, applied by trained and licensed technicians who understand how to keep treatments effective while minimizing exposure to children, pets, and sensitive family members.

We'll walk you through exactly what products we use and any recommended precautions before every treatment. No surprises — just professional, transparent service you can trust.

Pet Safe

Products safe around dogs & cats

Child Safe

Family-friendly application methods

🌿

EPA Registered

Approved, tested products only

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before you call

Yes! We offer dedicated Rodent Control services including inspection, bait stations, exclusion, and follow-up visits. Rodents can carry disease and cause serious property damage — we take it seriously.
In most cases we can schedule your first treatment within 24–48 hours. We serve the Greater Los Angeles area and try to accommodate your schedule as quickly as possible.
Absolutely. Pests don't take the winter off, and neither do we. Many species like cockroaches, rodents, and spiders actually seek warmth indoors during cooler months. Year-round protection is the best approach.
We stand behind our work 100%. If you see pests between scheduled treatments, call us and we'll return for a free re-treatment. Your peace of mind is our priority.
Pricing depends on your home size, pest type, and treatment plan. Text us SAVE50 to get a quote and claim 50% off your first service. No hidden fees — we're transparent about costs upfront.
Yes. We use EPA-registered products and apply them responsibly. We'll always advise you on any brief re-entry times if needed. Our technicians are trained to minimize exposure to your family and pets.
